title: Automatically Download Files in the File Column
excerpt: Is it possible to set up a File Column to automatically download files to our in-house server? It would be really helpful when a graphic file comes in for a project for it to go to a server that we use to edit videos. Th…

posts.author: PSlab (Peter Slabysz)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to set up a File Column to automatically download files to our in-house server? It would be really helpful when a graphic file comes in for a project for it to go to a server that we use to edit videos. The open, click, and download process becomes very time consuming.

posts.author: tterra (Altemar Terra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there.
I am still facing such a problem. Waste of time.
I found an alternatively way :
When its all done, its possible to download all files at once
Its possible to automate sending email containing the column file to download.
Therefore, hopefully mondays development will be come function of sending file available one day.
